creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
This patch to update multimedia/mlt to 6.0.0 also allows it to build against ffmpeg 3.0.x. The ports tree currently still has multimedia/ffmepg at version 2.8.6 because it is waiting for ports which depend on it to successfully build with the newer 3.0.x branch.

Can we please mark this bug report as "blocks 207547", to allow each bug report fixing build issues with ffmpeg 3.0.x to be easily tracked?
